offer: For logistics operations managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient manual processing causes late orders. We automate invoice extraction and categorization instead of manual data entry and categorization.
problem: Inefficient manual processing of shipping invoices
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics operations managers
